pi_items.source: WebFetch verification - confirmed as real sandbox website for web scraping practice
Consistent with target_url and confirmed via web access
Verified in setup_task.sh line 28 and export_result.sh line 10
verifier.py line 98 shows actual threshold is 200 bytes (>200 check), contradicting metadata claim of 300

privileged_info_summary: The task targets books.toscrape.com, a real public sandbox website designed for web scraping practice containing a catalog of 1,000 books. Users export CSS and JavaScript resources from this site using Screaming Frog SEO Spider to designated local directories. A critical discrepancy exists: the metadata claims a minimum report size of 300 characters, but the verifier implementation actually enforces a 200-byte threshold.
